propositions: Set up authenticated-authorship signing across all environments that write ticket events so require_authenticated can be enabled later, without flipping the flag in this work.
No Rebar Bot identity exists today; a shared ed25519 bot identity ticket must be bootstrapped and TOFU-registered for AWS and GitHub use.
Signing keys must be stored securely per environment (SSM for AWS, Actions secret for GitHub) and never committed.
The GHA reconcile-bridge inbound writer bypasses the signing seam and stamps no author fields, so it must be routed through the seam and signed.
The auto-lander comments on non-exempt work tickets and therefore must sign, while the review-bot only writes exempt types.
The require_authenticated schema default remains False and must not be set true in rebar.toml in this story.
